turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi. Umm, I need my diabetes medicines refilled. I've been getting them from your clinic for like six months now.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Sure! May I have your name and registered number?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Sudarshan Rao. Number is 9701234567. I take Metformin 500mg and Glimepiride 1mg.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you, Mr. Rao. I can see your prescription history. Your last prescription from Dr. Arun Srinivas is on record. I'll flag a refill request — he usually approves within a day. Do you want home delivery or will you pick up?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: I'll pick up. My office is near your clinic anyway.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Perfect. Once approved, the medicines will be kept ready at our pharmacy counter in your name. We'll send you an SMS confirmation when it's ready for pickup.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Great, thank you for making this easy.
